comments.body:
It would be awesome to get coverage for bats tests.

eg. 
https://blog.cloudflare.com/go-coverage-with-external-tests/

-edit- will discuss in IRC and raise it as an issue

I will take tests any way I can get them.  It is like arguing over which kind of ice cream.  The more tests the better.  Any hindrance to people contributing tests, is a bad thing.  I am not a huge fan of converting tests, since I think there are much better ways to spend our time improving the package, or adding more tests. :^)

@rhatdan / @TomSweeneyRedHat , if we have coverage reports it's a great incentive to add more tests. Getting coverage reports for the existing bats testing (or whatever method is used) would give a much clearer idea of where additional/new tests need to be introduced (i'd be happy to contribute more if I knew they were filling gaps).

I'm not sure how difficult it is to implement the CloudFlare solution above into the Buildah code, but think it would be worthwhile (sorry for the offtopic, should probably move into its own ticket)

-edit-

That being said, if the preferred path is gingko happy to start converting jobs over once @TomSweeneyRedHat has it up and running.
